channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Four killed in post-election violence in India’s West Bengal
item.description: Unrest grips the key eastern state after Modi's Hindu nationalist BJP wins the state election for the first time.

item.title: Who is Zack Polanski, UK Greens leader and rising political star?
item.description: Polanski has been likened to New York's Zohran Mamdani for his popular blend of environmental and socialist policies.

item.title: CNN founder Ted Turner dead at 87
item.description: No cause of death disclosed for media mogul who revolutionised news broadcasting.

item.title: Pro-Palestine group protests outside Israeli real estate event in New York
item.description: Demonstration against event featuring properties for sale in occupied West Bank is the second protest in six months.

item.title: UN demands Israel release Gaza flotilla activists, investigate abuse claims
item.description: Israel must 'immediately and unconditionally' release Saif Abu Keshek and Thiago de Avila, rights office spokesman says.

item.title: Follow the money: How far-right Reform UK built a global network
item.description: Reform UK’s rise is backed by individual donors, overseas trips and networks that contrast with its nationalist message.

item.title: Burkina Faso authorities accused of secretly detaining prominent journalist
item.description: RSF says investigation found Atiana Serge Oulon held at Ouagadougou villa, contradicting authorities' account.

item.title: Araghchi in Beijing: How China could shape the direction of the US-Iran war
item.description: Analysts say shared US and Chinese interests in reopening the Strait of Hormuz could create a path towards peace.

item.title: Russian drone hits kindergarten in Ukraine
item.description: A Russian drone strike has hit a kindergarten in Ukraine’s Sumy region.

item.title: Elderly man rescued from rubble after Israeli strike on Lebanon
item.description: An 80-year-old man has been pulled out from under the rubble of his house in the south.

item.title: Ben-Gvir ‘dreams’ of nooses in video posted to TikTok
item.description: Ben-Gvir has posted a video saying he ‘dreams’ of nooses, in a nod to the death penalty targeting Palestinian detainees.

item.title: Prestianni could miss Argentina games as FIFA extends ban to World Cup
item.description: Gianluca Prestianni could miss Argentina's first two group games if he is selected in their World Cup squad.

item.title: Australians slam ban on World Cup screenings at Federation Square
item.description: Matches from the World Cup 2026 will not be screened after poor fan behaviour at previous public watch parties in 2023.

item.title: What happened to Trump’s ‘Project Freedom’?
item.description: Donald Trump announced ‘Project Freedom’, an operation to escort stranded ships through the strait. Then paused it.

item.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz passage to be ensured after US pauses operation
item.description: Navy of Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) says safe transit will be ensured with new procedures in place.

item.title: What is the FDD, the pro-Israel think tank shaping Trump’s Iran policy?
item.description: FDD's talking points on the US-Israel war on Iran have been picked up by the Trump administration.

item.title: How hunger rewires the biology of an entire generation
item.description: The first 1,000 days of a child's life decide how they will grow up. Today, 35 million children spent those days hungry.

item.title: Protests erupt over Israeli settlement sales in New York
item.description: Hundreds protested outside an Israeli real estate event linked to settlement sales in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: Three people evacuated from hantavirus-hit cruise ship in the Atlantic
item.description: Development comes amid death of three others from rare disease as the Canary Islands refuses to allow cruise ship to dock.

item.title: Lessons from the war: A call for strategic reckoning in West Asia
item.description: The Israeli-US war on Iran shattered long-held assumptions about security, deterrence and stability in the region.

item.title: Has the US accepted Iran’s demand to settle Hormuz first, nuclear later?
item.description: US pauses Hormuz escorts after Pakistan-led mediation gains traction, signalling shift towards a limited framework deal.

item.title: Low US hotel bookings paint grim hospitality picture at the World Cup
item.description: Report says several factors, including visa barriers and geopolitical concerns are to be blamed for low booking numbers.

item.title: China calls for a ‘complete’ end to war on Iran
item.description: China calls for a ‘complete’ end to war on Iran

item.title: Operation Epic Fury has ended: Is the Iran war over?
item.description: Experts say Trump's pause of Project Freedom in Strait of Hormuz could be the 'beginning of the end' for war on Iran.

item.title: Sudan blames Ethiopia, UAE for recent drone attacks: What we know
item.description: Sudan recalls its ambassador to Addis Ababa as drone attacks shatter sense of calm after years of civil war.
